results.title: FIFA 2026: Who is the youngest player at this year's World Cup?
results.description: Mexico's Gilberto Mora, aged 17, is the youngest player selected for the FIFA World Cup 2026, with the teenager earning a place in the squad after impressing for Liga MX club Tijuana.

results.title: Severe Weather Alerts Issued Across 17 States in India
results.description: The India Meteorological Department has issued severe weather warnings for heavy rainfall and thunderstorms across 17 states, including Delhi-NCR and Uttar Pradesh. With changing weather patterns expected to disrupt daily life, residents are advised to stay indoors and heed safety guidelines. The IMD forecasts intense rainfall due to a western disturbance, promising relief from the heat but also raising concerns about flooding and safety. Authorities are on high alert to manage any emergencies that may arise. Stay tuned for continuous updates on this evolving weather situation.
